name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What user story does it enable?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Impact
- Target users:
- Expected adoption:
- Risk:

## Priority
- [ ] High - blocks current release
- [ ] Medium - next minor
- [ ] Low - backlog

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
